/opt/homebrew/opt/llvm/bin/clang -Wall  -O2 -g -DNDEBUG -arch arm64 -dynamiclib -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names -L/opt/homebrew/opt/llvm/lib -L/opt/homebrew/opt/libomp/lib -o /Users/arpan/Library/pyscf/pyscf/lib/libcvhf.dylib -install_name @rpath/libcvhf.dylib CMakeFiles/cvhf.dir/fill_nr_s8.c.o CMakeFiles/cvhf.dir/nr_incore.c.o CMakeFiles/cvhf.dir/nr_direct.c.o CMakeFiles/cvhf.dir/optimizer.c.o CMakeFiles/cvhf.dir/nr_direct_dot.c.o CMakeFiles/cvhf.dir/time_rev.c.o CMakeFiles/cvhf.dir/r_direct_o1.c.o CMakeFiles/cvhf.dir/rkb_screen.c.o CMakeFiles/cvhf.dir/r_direct_dot.c.o CMakeFiles/cvhf.dir/rah_direct_dot.c.o CMakeFiles/cvhf.dir/rha_direct_dot.c.o CMakeFiles/cvhf.dir/hessian_screen.c.o CMakeFiles/cvhf.dir/nr_sgx_direct.c.o CMakeFiles/cvhf.dir/nr_sr_vhf.c.o   -L/Users/arpan/Library/pyscf/pyscf/lib/deps/lib  -L/Users/arpan/Library/pyscf/pyscf/lib/deps/lib64  -L/usr/local/lib  -L/usr/local/lib64  -Wl,-rpath,@loader_path -Wl,-rpath,@loader_path/deps/lib -Wl,-rpath,@loader_path/deps/lib64 /Users/arpan/Library/pyscf/pyscf/lib/libcgto.dylib /Users/arpan/Library/pyscf/pyscf/lib/libnp_helper.dylib -lcint -framework Accelerate /opt/homebrew/opt/llvm/lib/libomp.dylib
